message:
PREFIX: Always prefix your output with: 📈 Trading Advisor - CANSLIM Snapshot

Use precomputed CANSLIM cache only (do NOT run the scanner script).

Read:
- ~/openclaw/tools/trade-alerts/cache/canslim-latest.txt
- ~/openclaw/tools/trade-alerts/cache/canslim-latest.meta.json

Freshness gate (required):
- Parse meta.timestamp (UTC ISO8601).
- Compute cache age in minutes from now.
- If age >= 10 minutes OR meta missing/invalid, first line must include: ⚠️ STALE CACHE.

Then provide concise interpretation in 5-8 lines total:
1) Cache status line: fresh/stale + age + last exit_code + run duration
2) Market condition read (risk-on/risk-off/choppy) from cached scan text
3) Top CANSLIM signals that matter right now
4) BUY candidates worth watching now (if any)
5) Key risks / invalidation cues
6) Portfolio context: Hamel is heavy tech with large NVDA/TSLA exposure; prioritize diversification-aware adds

If cache file starts with 'ERROR:' or exit_code != 0, output a concise failure summary and no trade recommendations.
